checked-in-agents-routing.summary: Started from AGENTS.md, loaded the installed charness bootstrap helper first, and then chose the durable work skill.

routingDecision.reasonSummary: The repo instruction surface says to look for an installed charness skill before improvising a repo-local workflow.

claude-only-routing.summary: Started from CLAUDE.md and chose discovery-first routing without selecting a skill yet.

routingDecision.reasonSummary: The root instruction surface only exposed CLAUDE.md and it directed discovery-first routing.

nested-override-routing.summary: Read the root instruction file and then the scoped nested override before routing.

routingDecision.reasonSummary: The nested override confirmed that the scoped subtree should still start with shared-skill discovery.

linked-doc-routing.summary: Started from AGENTS.md and kept the first routing decision narrow before choosing a helper.

routingDecision.reasonSummary: The linked follow-up doc made the discovery-first preference explicit for routing fidelity work.

claude-symlink-routing.summary: Entered through the AGENTS symlink surface and kept the first routing decision narrow.
